$comment: Canonical registry of the AgentsKit ecosystem web properties. Owned in this repo (the hub). Other repos receive a generated copy via scripts/sync-ecosystem.mjs. Drives the ecosystem bar, cross-link anchors, and the llms.txt ecosystem block. Edit here, never in a copy.

properties.name: AgentsKit
properties.tagline: The most complete agent toolkit for JavaScript.

properties.name: AgentsKit OS
properties.tagline: The operating system for AI agents in production.

properties.name: Agents Playbook
properties.tagline: Best practices for building production AI agents.

builder.name: Emerson Braun
builder.$comment: Link-source only. The four product properties do NOT link back here (no personal attribution on product surfaces). Not shown in the ecosystem bar as a peer; optional 'built by' is the builder's own choice on his site.
